info.title: DoronPay Unified API
info.description:
Swagger-ready unified API specification combining:
- Customer Custody APIs
- Spot Trading APIs
- Cached Crypto Rates APIs
- V2 Credit / Debit / Transfer transaction APIs

Notes:
- Routes tagged as internal are typically intended for platform workflows, workers, or admin use.
- Public routes are suitable for merchant-facing integrations.
- Callback/webhook payloads are documented in the callbacks section and reusable schemas.
- Most protected routes use the existing jwt-api strategy. Some public or utility routes are intentionally unauthenticated.

- Customer on-ramp / off-ramp APIs
- Merchant API routes for self-service profile, API apps, roles, custody, trading, ramp, platform accounts, and reports

Merchant API authentication:
- Partners first call POST /token under the /api/hub server base to generate a Bearer JWT access token.
- Use the returned token as Authorization: Bearer <token> for protected merchant and hub endpoints.
- Merchant self-service routes are available under /merchant/v1/*.

post.description: Use this endpoint first to exchange a merchant API key for a Bearer JWT access token. Because the server base URL is /api/hub, the full production URL is https://doronpay.com/api/hub/token. Use the returned token in the Authorization header for protected merchant APIs.

autoPayoutEnabled.description: When true, approved withdrawals are automatically picked by the payout orchestration cron

appId.description: Internal app id required by the payout disburser

accountType.description: Usually resolved from network if not provided

CryptoRemittanceRecipient.description: For MOMO, provider and phoneNumber are required by the Joi schema. For BANK, accountNumber is required and serviceType defaults to GIP.

UpdatePayoutApprovalRuleRequest.description: At least one field must be supplied. Amount min cannot be greater than amount max.

referenceId.description: Stable merchant-side reference for the deposit intent
walletProfileId or stable address monitor reference

ApiTokenOperation.description: Operation permission to bind to the generated token. Defaults to DEBIT.

merchantId.description: Merchant ObjectId assigned to the partner merchant account.

apikey.description: Merchant API key generated for the merchant API app. This key can be regenerated anytime.

token.description: Bearer JWT access token used in Authorization header.

appId.description: API app id used to generate this token.

network.description: For fiat deposits use FIAT. For crypto deposits use the crypto network.

asset.description: For fiat deposits this should match payload.currency. For crypto deposits it should match source.asset.

provider.description: Mobile money provider, for example MTN, VODAFONE, AIRTELTIGO

issuer.description: Bank issuer slug or name. Joi schema lowercases this value.

amount.description: Positive amount with up to 8 decimal places.

currency.description: Three-letter currency code, for example GHS, NGN, USD.

source.description: Must match rail. For example rail=MOMO requires source.type=MOMO.

CustomerCustodyDepositRequest.description: Initiate fiat or crypto deposit into a customer custody wallet. Validation rules: source.type must match rail. For CRYPTO deposits, target.network/asset must match source.network/asset. For fiat deposits, target.network must be FIAT and target.asset must match payload.currency. NGN debit currently supports BANK only.

feeAmount.description: Fee deducted from fiatAmount before minting. Must be less than fiatAmount.

destinationOwnerType.description: DoronPay owner that will receive the stablecoin.

destinationChainAddress.description: Solana owner wallet address. This is not the SPL token account.

fundingReference.description: Bank deposit/reference used to link reserve funding.

CreateStablecoinMintRequest.description: Create bank-grade mint request and open maker-checker approval. feeAmount must be less than fiatAmount. Customer minting is disabled unless explicitly enabled by metadata or environment config.

RampDirection.description: ON_RAMP converts fiat into crypto. OFF_RAMP converts crypto into fiat.

RampSettlementMode.description: Controls how the ramp output is settled.

sourceAmount.description: Fiat amount for ON_RAMP and crypto amount for OFF_RAMP.

sourceAssetWalletId.description: OFF_RAMP custody debit wallet. Optional for external crypto deposit flows.

destinationAssetWalletId.description: ON_RAMP custody credit wallet. Optional for external-address or merchant-managed settlement.

paymentConfirmed.description: Required for ON_RAMP execution before crypto is credited or released.

cryptoDepositConfirmed.description: Required for OFF_RAMP when sourceAssetWalletId was not supplied.

settlementCompleted.description: Set true if external crypto transfer or fiat payout has already been completed.

MerchantTransactionReportRequest.description: Merchant is resolved from the authenticated jwt-admin token; do not send merchantId.

CreateMerchantRampQuoteRequest.description: Create an on-ramp/off-ramp quote for the authenticated merchant. MerchantId is resolved from the token.
